instructions.summary: Create a PostHog project for VerdeDesk and add the API key to Vercel env vars
instructions.detail: PostHog analytics is already integrated in the landing page code (VITE_POSTHOG_KEY). We need the actual project key to start tracking page views and waitlist signup events.
instructions.exact_action:
1. Go to posthog.com (or eu.posthog.com for EU data residency) → Create account/project named 'VerdeDesk'
2. Copy the Project API Key (starts with phc_...)
3. In Vercel dashboard → verdedesk project → Settings → Environment Variables, add:
   VITE_POSTHOG_KEY = phc_...
   VITE_POSTHOG_HOST = https://eu.posthog.com
4. Redeploy or wait for next deploy
instructions.unblocks: Landing page analytics — page views and signup conversion tracking
